errors.emailExist: User already exists. Use another email.
errors.zodParseSchema: Some fields have been filled out incorrectly. Please correct them.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.emailFormatInvalid: Email address format is invalid. Check if there's a typo.
errors.disposableEmail: We do not allow disposable email addresses.
errors.invalidEmail: Invalid email. Please try another one.
errors.authProviderError: Failed to connect to the login provider. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Check your mailbox.

validation.requiredUppercase: This field must contain upper characters
validation.requiredNumber: This field must contain number characters
validation.minChar: This field must contain more than {min} characters

letter.heading: Hi, {name}!
letter.paragraphMain: Thank you for registering! We are happy to welcome you to our community. Please click the button below to confirm your email and complete your registration.
letter.paragraphDescription: This link is valid for 3 hours. If you haven't created an account, simply ignore this email.
letter.footer: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:

emailAlreadyRegistered.subject: You already have an account on Ai Smart Dictionary.

letter.preview: Sign in to your AI Smart Dictionary account
letter.heading: Welcome back, {name}!
letter.paragraphMain: We received a request to sign up with this email address. However, you already have an account with us. You don't need to register again.
letter.paragraphDescription: If you want to access your account, simply click the button above. If you didn't try to sign up, you can safely ignore this email.
letter.footer: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

emailResetPassword.subject: Confirm your email address to recover your password.

letter.heading: Hello, {name}!
letter.paragraphMain: We have received a request to reset the password for your account.
letter.paragraphDescription: If you did not send this request, simply ignore this email.
letter.footer: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
